arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca's five telling Chelsea transfer decisions amid Christopher Nkunku Bournemouth snub
arts.sum: Maresca heavily rotated his team for the cup tie and there is a big expectation that the Italian will make more changes this evening as the Blues return to Premier League action. Chelsea are looking to end their poor patch of form in the Premier League this evening as they welcome Bournemouth to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca will now leave one player out of Chelsea squad vs Bournemouth as January exit nears - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea return to Premier League action on Tuesday night when they host Bournemouth at Stamford Bridge. The Blues are without a win in their last...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Chelsea open talks about a swap deal for Christopher Nkunku and Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea and Bayern Munich have begun negotiations regarding a swap deal between Christopher Nkunku and Mathys Tel. As stated within the report, Tel has recently spoken…

arts.ttl: Swap deal: Chelsea & Euro giants hold “initial talks” over smart attacker transfers
arts.sum: Chelsea and Bayern Munich have reportedly held talks over a potential transfer exchange involving Mathys Tel and Christopher Nkunku. Nkunku hasn’t had much playing time since joining Chelsea, partly due to injuries, and it perhaps makes sense that he’s now open to a move elsewhere to get onto the pitch more regularly. Bayern are seemingly […] The post Swap deal: Chelsea & Euro giants hold “initial talks” over smart attacker transfers appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Veiga transfer makes sense for Chelsea on one front but leaves Maresca problem
arts.sum: There is speculation that Veiga sees himself as a centre-back in the long-term and with the imperious Levi Colwill looking like that position on the left-hand side of a back two is his for years to come, there is no wonder the Portugal international is considering a move away. Borussia Dortmund are in talks with Chelsea to sign Renato Veiga but the two clubs are still yet to reach an agreement, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Rio Ngumoha: Why former Chelsea youngster could be future Liverpool star after Accrington Stanley FA Cup game
arts.sum: Rio Ngumoha is one of the brightest talents in English football and has a bright future with Liverpool and Arne Slot, should the club handle his development correctly.
